name: Black List
summary: Bordeaux specialty cafe near Place Pey Berland, useful if the group is moving through the city center.
whyItMatters: Gives the Bordeaux day a second central specialty option in case L'Alchimiste or SIP is closed or crowded.
pros: European Coffee Trip lists Black List in the Bordeaux specialty guide
Mapped at Place Pey Berland, a central landmark area
Good backup density with other central Bordeaux coffee options
cons: Current official opening hours were not found in crawlable sources
Central location may be more crowded or affected by Stage 7 movements
